metadata.title: 7 Expeditions GT · Acatenango & Guatemala Volcano Tours
metadata.description: Guided hikes up Acatenango, Fuego, Pacaya, Agua, Atitlán and Tajumulco volcanoes. Certified local guides, small groups, gear included. Book your Guatemala volcano tour today.
metadata.ogDescription: Guided ascents of Acatenango, Fuego, Pacaya and more. Certified guides, gear included. Book your spot!
metadata.ogImageAlt: Guatemala volcano expeditions with 7 Expeditions GT
metadata.keywords: Acatenango volcano hike, Guatemala volcano tours, Fuego volcano trek, Pacaya volcano tour, Antigua Guatemala day trips, Acatenango sunrise hike, Guatemala adventure travel, volcano glamping Guatemala

hero.description: Seven volcanoes, one country. Guided ascents to Acatenango, Pacaya, Agua, Atitlán and more — with certified local guides, small groups, and Fuego lighting up the night.

items.guidesText: Trained in mountain first aid. They know every route in any weather condition.
items.groupsText: No maximum group size, always with a safe pace and real attention to every participant.
items.equipmentText: Trekking poles, mountain jacket, gloves, and sleeping bag for high-altitude expeditions.
items.safetyText: Constant volcanic activity monitoring with INSIVUMEH. Routes adjusted or suspended when conditions require it.

tours.title: The expeditions
tours.description: Every route includes a certified guide, mountain gear, and transportation from Antigua Guatemala or Guatemala City. Choose your next adventure!
tours.empty: No expeditions are currently published. Go to /studio to add one.
tours.infoPdfTitle: Open itinerary and details as PDF

calendar.title: Calendar & Full Catalogue
calendar.description: Browse itineraries, dates, glamping menus, and prices directly here.

reservation.eyebrow: One last step before you climb
reservation.title: Book your expedition
reservation.description: Fill out the form and send your request directly via WhatsApp or email. A guide will confirm availability within 24 hours.
reservation.placeholderMessage: Allergies, fitness level, gear you need to rent…
reservation.validationHint: Fill in your name and at least an email or phone number to enable sending.
reservation.waMessageIntro: Hi, I'd like to book an expedition with 7 Expeditions GT.

footer.description: Guided expeditions to Guatemala's volcanoes. Antigua Guatemala and Guatemala City.
footer.weatherNotice: Routes subject to weather conditions and volcanic activity.

gallery.description: Real photos from our climbs. Follow us on social media to relive every expedition in real time.

volcanoProfile.ariaLabel: Elevation profile of Guatemala's volcanoes, from tallest to shortest
volcanoProfile.hint: Tap a volcano to see its expedition ↓
